text: Strength does not come from physical capacity. It comes from an indomitable will.
author: Mahatma Gandhi

text: You have power over your mind, not outside events. Realize this, and you will find strength.
author: Marcus Aurelius

text: The strongest people are not those who show strength in front of us, but those who win battles we know nothing about.
author: Unknown

text: Mental toughness is doing what is right for the team when it's not the best thing for you.
author: Bill Belichick

text: The pain you feel today is the strength you feel tomorrow.
author: Unknown

text: It's not about how hard you hit. It's about how hard you can get hit and keep moving forward.
author: Rocky Balboa

text: Tough times never last, but tough people do.
author: Robert H. Schuller

text: Your mind will quit a thousand times before your body does. Feel the fear and do it anyway.
author: Unknown

text: Out of suffering have emerged the strongest souls. The most massive characters are seared with scars.
author: Khalil Gibran

text: He who has a why to live can bear almost any how.
author: Friedrich Nietzsche

text: Pressure is a privilege. It only comes to those who earn it.
author: Billie Jean King

text: You never know how strong you are until being strong is your only choice.
author: Bob Marley

text: The battle is won or lost in the six inches between your ears.
author: Unknown

text: Mental toughness is to physical as four is to one.
author: Bob Knight

text: Calm mind brings inner strength and self-confidence.
author: Dalai Lama

text: When you can't control what's happening, challenge yourself to control how you respond.
author: Unknown

text: The harder the battle, the sweeter the victory.
author: Les Brown

text: Do not pray for an easy life. Pray for the strength to endure a difficult one.
author: Bruce Lee

text: Endure the pain of discipline or suffer the pain of regret.
author: Unknown

text: You are braver than you believe, stronger than you seem, and smarter than you think.
author: A.A. Milne
